transcript.content: 继续之后，第 3 个点也已经基本收住了。 现在状态是：
直接给你一条最短回归命令，方便你以后自己 spot check。
最短 spot check 我建议就这 2 条： ```bash npm run codex:vscode:gc --silent ```
接下来 我要做蛇呢么？

接下来做这 3 件事就够了。 1. 先留一条最小回归命令 直接用这条做以后 spot check： ```bash npm run codex:vscode:gc --silent ``` 如果怀疑 prompt 没及时落盘，再用： ```bash node scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format markdown --prompt "[GC-D2] 回到编辑器问题。…
或者补一个 repo 内可重复的 smoke/eval case，把 GC-D2 收进固定回归
已经补进去了。 新回归 case 在： - [evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js)
已经修到全绿了。 我做了两件事： - 把 Codex minor GC 默认允许的 guarded relation 放宽到包含 `continue` - 把 `codex-minor-gc-current-editor-update-after-detour` 收进固定 live eval case
继续扩 harder cases，把类似 GC-B 的自然中文多轮切题也收进固定回归

decision.archive_summary: Earlier work closed out the prior GC-D2 regression steps: a minimal spot-check command was proposed, a repeatable smoke/eval case was added, guarded relation handling was widened to include `continue`, and that earlier regression block was reported green. The active thread then moved to expanding harder natural-Chinese multi-turn topic-shift cases in fixed regression coverage.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user turn stays on the same active task introduced at t10 and depends directly on t11's just-added harder-case context, so this is `continue` and those turns should remain raw. Older turns are resolved status/reporting blocks for prior subproblems and are good eviction candidates. No older turn needs to survive as a separate semantic pin beyond what the remaining raw active block already covers.
